Title: Dear Evan Hansen
Description: Stage Door brings the six-time Tony-winning musical to the Electric Theater for a four-night run. A letter that was never meant to be seen sends a lonely teenager on a journey of self-discovery, family, and what it means to be found.
Short Description: A six-time Tony-winning musical about loneliness, family, and being found, staged for four nights only.
Image Alt: Dear Evan Hansen — Stage Door at the Electric Theater

Title: Disney's Beauty and the Beast Jr.
Description: Encore's summer mainstage features young performers ages 7–18 in a full production of the beloved Disney musical. Be Our Guest for a tale as old as time, performed with live accompaniment.
Short Description: Encore's summer mainstage musical, performed by a cast of young artists ages 7 to 18.

Title: Electric Film Series: Singin' in the Rain
Description: FMASU's free monthly film series brings the great films back to the big screen. June's screening is the 1952 MGM classic Singin' in the Rain, presented with a short introduction by a local film historian. Free and open to the public.
Short Description: A free screening of the 1952 MGM classic, with a short introduction by a local film historian.
Image Alt: Singin' in the Rain — Electric Film Series

Title: Red Rock Dance Festival
Description: The annual Red Rock Dance Festival returns with two evenings of new work from regional and visiting choreographers, plus a juried showcase of student choreography. A weekend of workshops surrounds the main stage performances.
Short Description: Two evenings of new work from regional and visiting choreographers, plus a juried student showcase.

Title: Come from Away
Description: The true story of 7,000 stranded passengers and the small town in Newfoundland that welcomed them. Stage Door's production of the Broadway hit runs four nights only at the Electric Theater.
Short Description: The Broadway hit about a small town in Newfoundland that welcomed 7,000 stranded passengers.

Title: Aspire Show Choir Showcase
Description: Encore's Aspire Performing Co. presents its season-opening showcase: a single evening of musical theater repertoire, contemporary pop arrangements, and student-choreographed numbers.
Short Description: Encore's show choir opens the season with musical theater repertoire and student-choreographed numbers.

Title: HorrorFest International 2026
Description: A three-day international festival of independent horror cinema, curated by FMASU. The lineup includes feature premieres, short film blocks, filmmaker Q&As, and the always-popular Saturday-night midnight selection.
Short Description: A three-day festival of independent horror features, shorts, and filmmaker Q&As.

Title: Fall Contemporary Concert
Description: St. George Dance Company opens its fall season with an evening of contemporary works from the resident company and guest choreographers. The program spans a range of contemporary styles, from neo-classical to release-based movement.
Short Description: An evening of contemporary works from the resident company and guest choreographers.
